title: TestItem
description: A single extracted engineering requirement / test item.

Category.description: Engineering domain classification (e.g., Dimension, Mechanical, Acoustic)

Function.description: Functional group (e.g., Physical Specification, Force Specification)

What.description: Verbatim requirement text copied from the source document

How.description: Test method if explicitly defined, otherwise 'Not explicitly defined'

Sample Size.description: Sample size if explicitly stated, otherwise 'Not specified'

SourceDocument.description: Document name/number if stated, otherwise 'Not explicitly stated'

SourceSection.description: Section/table/figure identifier, or 'Page {n}, Block {id}' as fallback

EvidenceRef.description: Block ID(s) from the input JSON (e.g., 'p1_b25' or 'p1_b25, p2_b3')

EvidenceQuote.description: A single sentence or table row copied VERBATIM (exactly, no paraphrase) from the provided section text that most directly supports this requirement. Must be a literal substring of the section content.
